chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 327 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلشَّعْرُ اَلْحَسَنُ مِنْ كِسْوَةِ اَللَّهِ تَعَالَى فَأَكْرِمُوهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.327 - He (as) said: "Beautiful hair is part of Allah’s (swt) provision, so honor it."
